critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx successfully refactored from 1753 lines to 48 lines - clean component architecture
All sections properly extracted to /app/frontend/src/components/landing/ directory
Extra's & Add-ons pricing grid correctly implemented with data-testid='extras-pricing'
All 6 add-ons displayed: Extra pagina's €50, Meertalige website €200, Extra contactformulier €80, Boekingssysteem €250, Google Reviews €120, Dark mode €80
Mobile responsive layout working correctly at 375px viewport
Shopping cart icons visible on both desktop (data-testid='nav-cart-icon') and mobile (data-testid='mobile-cart-icon')
Dark mode toggle functional across all pages
Contact form integration with /api/contact working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29: Full website audit after major refactoring. LandingPage.jsx was split from 1753 lines into 8 separate component files in /app/frontend/src/components/landing/. New Extra's & Add-ons pricing grid added with 6 items including Dark Mode €80. All navigation dropdowns (DIENSTEN, MEER) work correctly. Mobile responsive layout (375px) working with hamburger menu and cart icon. YRVA10 discount code gives 10% off. Contact form submits to /api/contact successfully. All text is in Dutch. No theme chooser modal appears - default is light mode.
